\documentclass[11pt]{article}
\usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}
\usepackage[T1]{fontenc}
\usepackage{amsmath}
\title{A Benchmark Paper with Footnote-Marked Authors}
\author{Frank Example\thanks{Department of Economics} \and Grace Example\thanks{Department of Finance}}
\date{2026}
\begin{document}
\maketitle
\begin{abstract}
This benchmark is designed to test whether parsers can recover author names without being confused by footnote markers or affiliations.
\end{abstract}
\section{Introduction}
Footnote markers should not contaminate author extraction.
\section{Conclusion}
A robust parser should return only clean author names.
\end{document}
